fun stuff?

Hey, how would you like to access fun stuff?

The file dump (also known as fun stuff) is my dumping ground for various random files that I thought would be cool to share, such as radio stuff, notes and various video/audio files.

Access via Copyparty (recommended! most features)

Access via NGINX directory listing (for very old/basic browsers)
